steps.title: Interpret 'increased by 70%'
steps.content: When the number of views increases by 70%, the new amount equals: $$\text{new} = \text{old} + 0.70 \cdot \text{old} = 1.70 \cdot \text{old}$$ Every 2 days, views multiply by 1.70. This means the base must be 1.70, eliminating choices A and B.

steps.title: Set up exponent from 2-day periods
steps.content: Growth happens every 2 days, so in $x$ days there are $\frac{x}{2}$ two-day periods. With each period multiplying by 1.70, the exponent is $\frac{x}{2}$ (not $2x$). Therefore: $$f(x) = 233\left(1.70\right)^{\frac{x}{2}}$$ That matches choice C — C is correct.
